info.title: Telegram MTProto API
info.description: OpenAPI specification generated from the Telegram MTProto schema. Each RPC method is exposed as a POST endpoint. This is a low-level protocol mapping; see the [Telegram API documentation](https://core.telegram.org/api) for protocol details.
